title: Bitcoin tipped for Q3 'macro bottom' near $50K as major liquidity grab looms
summary: Bitcoin market participants may be left in "complete disbelief" as the market reverses from a liquidity grab without another major leg lower, a trader predicted.

title: Bitcoin activity nears record highs on microtransaction surge
summary: Near-record OP_RETURN usage is driving a surge in low-value Bitcoin transactions, pushing Bitcoin network activity close to all-time highs despite muted price action.

title: Ambani’s Jio Platforms Files For Long-Awaited India IPO
summary: Jio Platforms Ltd., a crown jewel of billionaire Mukesh Ambani’s oil-to-retail conglomerate, filed draft listing documents on Friday, starting the process of unlocking shareholder value in one of India’s most-anticipated initial public offerings.

title: Stocks Slide as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.

title: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
summary: The asset manager's two proposed "Bitcoin DRIP" funds would hold U.S. stocks and reinvest dividends into Bitcoin, a novel ETF structure.

title: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 sits within 1% of Claude Opus 4.8 on long-horizon coding benchmarks, runs entirely on Huawei silicon, and undercuts Western frontier models by up to 82% per token.

title: Base targets June 25 mainnet launch for Beryl upgrade and new B20 token standard
summary: Base's Beryl upgrade introduces the B20 native token standard, cuts withdrawal delays to 5 days, and activates on mainnet June 25.
